oo.t: abbr. 面向对象程式设计（Object Oriented）；已订购而尚未交货的（on order）
oo.d:
a. One.
n. A beautiful bird (Moho nobilis) of the Hawaiian Islands. It
   yields the brilliant yellow feathers formerly used in making the royal
   robes. Called also yellow-tufted honeysucker.

oo-er.t: （表示惊讶, 尤指对性方面）啊呦, 哎呀

ooaa.t: abbr. Olive Oil Association of America 美国橄榄油协会

ooapogamy.t: 二倍单性生殖, 体细胞单性生殖

oob.t: abbr. out of business 失业; opening of business 商业开张; out of bed 起床; outs on base 基础付出的钱

oobs.t: (oob 的复数) abbr. out of business 失业; opening of business 商业开张; out of bed 起床; outs on base 基础付出的钱

oocyanin.t:
[化] 胆绿素; 蛋壳青素
[医] 蛋壳青素

oocytase.t: [医] 溶卵酶, 卵细胞溶[解]酶

oocyte.t:
n. 卵母细胞
[医] 卵母细胞

(oocyte 的复数) n. 卵母细胞
[医] 卵母细胞
oocytes.d:
plural of oocyte
n. a female gametocyte that develops into an ovum after two meiotic divisions

oodles.d: n a large number or amount

oods.t: (ood 的第三人称 -s形式) abbr. 面向对象设计

ooecium.d:
n. One of the special zooids, or cells, of Bryozoa, destined
   to receive and develop ova; an ovicell. See Bryozoa.

oof.t:
n. 钱, 现钞
[医] 羊传染性口疮, 触染性深脓疱, 羊痘疮

oogenesis.t: n. [生]卵子发生, 成卵法

oogonium.t: n. [生]卵原细胞, 藏卵器
oogonium.d:
n. A special cell in certain cryptogamous plants containing
   oospheres, as in the rockweeds (Fucus), and the orders Vaucherieae and
   Peronosporeae.

oogoniums.t: n. 卵原细胞, 藏卵器( oogonium的名词复数 )

ooh.t: int. （表示惊异、热心、高兴或不悦的叫声）哦！

v. express admiration and pleasure by uttering `ooh' or `aah'

ook.t: abbr. 通断键控；开关键控（On-Off Keying）

ooking.t: (ook 的现在分词) abbr. 通断键控；开关键控（On-Off Keying）

ool.t: abbr. oology 鸟卵学; operator-oriented language 面向操作员的语言

oolemma.t: [医] 卵膜, 明带(哺乳类)

oolite.t: n. [地质]鱼卵石, 鱼卵状石灰石,鲕粒岩
oolite.d:
n. A variety of limestone, consisting of small round grains,
   resembling the roe of a fish. It sometimes constitutes extensive beds,
   as in the European Jurassic. See the Chart of Geology.

oolites.t: (oolite 的复数) n.[地质]鱼卵石, 鱼卵状石灰石,鲕粒岩
oolites.d:
plural of oolite
n. A variety of limestone, consisting of small round grains,
   resembling the roe of a fish. It sometimes constitutes extensive beds,
   as in the European Jurassic. See the Chart of Geology.

oolith.t: n. [地]鲕粒(指构成鲕粒岩的基本粒子)

oolitic.t: a. [地]鲕粒岩的, 像鲕粒岩的
oolitic.d:
a. Of or pertaining to oolite; composed of, or resembling,
   oolite.

oological.d: a. Of or pertaining to oology.

oologist.t: n. 鸟卵学家；鸟卵收集者

oology.d: n. the branch of zoology that studies eggs (especially birds' eggs and their size, shape, coloration, and number)

oolong.d: n. Chinese tea leaves that have been partially fermented before being dried

oom.t: n. <南非>伯父,叔叔(对长者的尊称)

oomatogenesis.t: [医] 躯型发生, 体征形成

oomiac.t: n. （爱斯基摩人所用的）木架蒙皮船

oomiak.d: n. A long, broad boat used by the Eskimos.

oompa loompa.t: [网络] 奥帕伦帕人；呜巴鲁巴；奥帕古帕人

oompah.t: n. （铜管乐器发出的）嗡姆吧声

oomph.t: n. 性感, 热情, 精力, 吸引力
oomph.d:
n attractiveness to the opposite sex
n the activeness of an energetic personality

ooms.t: abbr. object-oriented multimedia software 面向对象的多媒体软件

oomycetes.t: [网络] 卵菌纲；卵菌类；卵球菌亚纲

oon.t: abbr. 面向对象的数值计算（object-oriented numerics）

oona.t: n. 乌纳（等于Oonagh, 女子名）

oop.t: [计] 面向对象的程序设计
oop.d: v. t. To bind with a thread or cord; to join; to unite.

oopak.d: n. A kind of black tea.

oophore.d:
n. An alternately produced form of certain cryptogamous
   plants, as ferns, mosses, and the like, which bears antheridia and
   archegonia, and so has sexual fructification, as contrasted with the
   sporophore, which is nonsexual, but produces spores in countless
   number. In ferns the oophore is a minute prothallus; in mosses it is
   the leafy plant.

oophorectomy.d: n surgical removal of one of both ovaries

oophoric.d: a. Having the nature of, or belonging to, an oophore.

oophoritis.d: n inflammation of one or both ovaries

oophoritis serosa.t: [医] 浆液性卵巢炎, 卵巢水肿

oophorogenous.t: [医] 卵巢原的, 卵巢性的

oophoroma folliculare.t: [医] 布伦纳氏瘤, 卵巢纤维纳氏瘤

oophorosalpingectomy.t: [医] 卵巢输卵管切除术, 输卵管卵巢切除术
oophorosalpingectomy.d: n surgical removal of one or both ovaries and the corresponding Fallopian tubes

oophorostomy.t: [医] 卵巢[囊肿]造口[引流]术

oophorotomy.t: [医] 卵巢切开术, 卵巢切除术

oophyte.t: n. [植](蕨、苔藓等的)有性世代
oophyte.d:
n. Any plant of a proposed class or grand division
   (collectively termed oophytes or Oophyta), which have their sexual
   reproduction accomplished by motile antherozoids acting on oospheres,
   either while included in their oogonia or after exclusion.

oophytic.d: a. Of or pertaining to an oophyte.

oopl.t: 面向对象程序设计语言

oopm.t: 面向对象程序设计方法学

oopod.t: (=oopodeus)产卵器(尾剌的一部分), 卵袋

ooporphyrin.t: 蛋壳色素, 蛋壳卟啉

oops.t: interj. (表示惊讶、沮丧、谢罪等)哎哟

oops-a-daisy.t: int. （帮助别人爬过或上到某物时所说的）上

ooram.t: 面向对象的需求分析法

oorial.d:
n. A wild, bearded sheep inhabiting the Ladakh mountains. It
   is reddish brown, with a dark beard from the chin to the chest.

oors.t: (oor 的复数)  [医][=out of room]室外

oos.t: (oo 的复数) abbr. 面向对象程式设计（Object Oriented）；已订购而尚未交货的（on order）
oos.d:
plural of oo
a. One.
n. A beautiful bird (Moho nobilis) of the Hawaiian Islands. It
   yields the brilliant yellow feathers formerly used in making the royal
   robes. Called also yellow-tufted honeysucker.

oosome.t: [生]卵小体, 生殖细胞决定体

oosperm.t:
n. 受精卵
[医] 受精卵
oosperm.d:
n. The ovum, after fusion with the spermatozoon in
   impregnation.

oosphere.d: n a gamete; used especially of lower plants

oospora.t: [医] 卵孢子菌属, 接合孢子菌属

oospora indica.t: [医] 足肿卵孢子菌, 足肿放线菌

oosporangium.t: [医] 卵孢子鞘, 卵孢子囊
oosporangium.d:
n. An oogonium; also, a case containing oval or rounded
   spores of some other kind than oospores.

oospore.d: n a thick-walled sexual spore that develops from a fertilized oosphere in some algae and fungi

oosporic.d: a. Of or pertaining to an oospore.

oostegite.d:
n. One of the plates which in some Crustacea inclose a
   cavity wherein the eggs are hatched.

oot.t: abbr. out of tolerance 无法忍受; out of town 不在城里

ootheca.t:
n. 卵巢
[医] 卵巢, 卵鞘, 卵巢
ootheca.d:
n. An egg case, especially those of many kinds of mollusks,
   and of some insects, as the cockroach. Cf. Ooecium.

oothecostomy.t: [医] 卵巢[囊肿]造口[引流]术

ootid.t:
n. 卵细胞
[医] 卵细胞
ootid.d: n. mature ovum after penetration by sperm but before the formation of a zygote

ootw.t: abbr. operations other than the war 有别于战争的军事行动

ooty.t: abbr. Ootacamund, Tamil Nadu 奥塔卡曼德，泰米尔纳都

ootype.d:
n. The part of the oviduct of certain trematode worms in which
   the ova are completed and furnished with a shell.

ooze.t:
n. 渗流, 分泌物
v. 渗出, 泄漏
ooze.d:
n any thick, viscous matter
n the process of seeping
v pass gradually or leak through or as if through small openings
v release (a liquid) in drops or small quantities

ooze leather.t: 植鞣绒面革（尤指小牛皮革）

oozed.t: v. （浓液等）慢慢地冒出, 渗出( ooze的过去式和过去分词 ); 使（液体）缓缓流出; （浓液）渗出, 慢慢流出

oozes.t: v. （浓液等）慢慢地冒出, 渗出( ooze的第三人称单数 ); 使（液体）缓缓流出; （浓液）渗出, 慢慢流出
oozes.d:
n any thick, viscous matter
n the process of seeping
v pass gradually or leak through or as if through small openings
v release (a liquid) in drops or small quantities

oozing.t: v. （浓液等）慢慢地冒出, 渗出( ooze的现在分词 ); 使（液体）缓缓流出; （浓液）渗出, 慢慢流出

oozing tumor.t: [医] 渗液性瘤(发生于大阴唇的一种肿瘤)

oozings.t: (oozing 的复数) v. （浓液等）慢慢地冒出, 渗出( ooze的现在分词 ); 使（液体）缓缓流出; （浓液）渗出, 慢慢流出
oozings.d:
plural of oozing
s. leaking out slowly

oozy.t: a. 潮湿的, 湿淋淋的, 渗出的
